summary: Iteration 2 testing: Asaas checkout flow, billing pages, PaymentResult pages. All critical features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 403 when basic plan max_mechanics (2) is reached. Pre-existing test data causes issue in test. Not a bug - expected plan limit behavior.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1056 lines - still over 700 line limit, consider splitting
asaas_create_checkout_session checks ASAAS_API_KEY at top but also inside endpoint - minor duplication

success_rate.frontend: 100% - billing page loads, checkout button present, PaymentResult pages render correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All billing flows working: POST /api/billing/checkout returns Asaas sandbox URL (200), plans API returns 3 plans with correct prices, /billing/success and /billing/failed render correctly as public routes. No MyServices error. Checkout button 'Ir para o Checkout Asaas' present on /admin/billing. Login form uses input[type=email] selector (no data-testid on email/password fields).
rca_of_issue: Previous 400 error on checkout was due to incorrect payload format sent to Asaas API. Fixed by using billingTypes array, chargeTypes RECURRENT, and subscription object with cycle/nextDueDate - Asaas collects customer CPF/CNPJ directly on their checkout page.
